teams.name: Mariners
headlines: Mariners walk off A's 5-4 on Wednesday with back-to-back-to-back hits from Raleigh, Rodriguez, and Naylor
Cal Raleigh homers in back-to-back games, showing signs of heating up
Alex Hoppe recalled from Triple-A Tacoma to reinforce bullpen
Bryce Miller making rehab start with Triple-A Tacoma, averaging 97.1 mph on fastball
Brendan Donovan placed on 10-day IL with left groin strain

keyUpdates: The Mariners' offense finally delivered in the clutch with a walk-off win against the A's on April 22
Cal Raleigh appears to be heating up after homering in consecutive games
Bryce Miller is progressing well in rehab, showing promising velocity and pitch mix
Top prospect Colt Emerson's future with the organization is secure as he continues development
details.situation: The Mariners are showing signs of life after a slow start. The walk-off win against the A's demonstrated the heart of the order can deliver when it matters. Cal Raleigh's recent power surge is particularly encouraging.
details.today: No game scheduled for April 23. The team has an off day before their next series.

last_game.highlights: Walk-off victory with consecutive hits from Cal Raleigh, Julio Rodriguez, and Josh Naylor in the bottom of the 9th

teams.name: Seahawks
headlines: 2026 NFL Draft kicks off tonight in Pittsburgh - Round 1 begins April 23
Seahawks enter draft with only four picks over three days
Seahawks hold pick No. 32 in first round (last pick)
Team needs focus on running back and cornerback positions
Top targets include Notre Dame RB Jadarian Price and San Diego State CB Chris Johnson

keyUpdates: The 2026 NFL Draft begins Thursday, April 23 at 5:00 PM PT from Pittsburgh
Seahawks have just four picks total, including No. 32 in the first round
Coming off Super Bowl championship, the roster is strong and picks are 'cherries on top'
Running back is the biggest need after losing Kenneth Walker III
Team may trade out of first round as they have done in the past
details.situation: The defending Super Bowl champion Seahawks are in a unique position with minimal draft capital but a loaded roster. They can afford to take best player available or trade back to accumulate more picks.
details.today: Round 1 of the 2026 NFL Draft kicks off at 5:00 PM PT. Seahawks fans should settle in for a long evening as Seattle picks last at No. 32.

last_game.highlights: Seahawks captured Super Bowl title in February 2026

teams.name: Kraken
headlines: Kraken officially eliminated from playoff contention on April 11
Third consecutive season missing playoffs after 2022-23 postseason appearance
Team unraveled after Olympic break following strong first three quarters
Philipp Grubauer finished with 14 goals saved above expected - team best
Matty Beniers achieved second 50-point campaign of his career

keyUpdates: Eliminated from playoffs on April 11 when LA Kings defeated Edmonton Oilers
Goaltending was a bright spot - finished at .903 save percentage (8th in NHL)
Power play converted at 23% before Olympic break but cratered to 10.5% after
Young players like Berkly Catton (66 games) and Ryan Winterton made meaningful contributions
Team played meaningful games in April, sitting three points out of wild card on April 1
details.situation: The Kraken's season ended in disappointment after a promising start. They were in playoff contention until the Olympic break but collapsed down the stretch. The emergence of young talent and stabilizing goaltending are positives to build on for next season.
details.today: Season has concluded. Team is in offseason mode with roster questions and coaching debates ahead.

last_game.highlights: Season finale - team ran out of gas in final games after Olympic break

teams.name: Sounders
headlines: Sounders host FC Dallas on Saturday, April 25 at 7:30 PM PT at Lumen Field
Cristian Roldan named to MLS Team of the Matchday after brace vs St. Louis
Sounders dismantled St. Louis CITY SC 4-1 last weekend
Andrew Thomas ranks 3rd in MLS in Goals-Expected Goals (-3.02)
Sounders matches now re-air weekly on FOX 13+ starting April 21

keyUpdates: Sounders are 5-1-1 (16 points, 4th in West) heading into weekend match vs Dallas
Cristian Roldan delivered a masterclass performance with two goals against St. Louis
Goalkeeper Andrew Thomas has been outstanding in his first season as No. 1
Team has scored 7 goals in last 2 home games after scoring just 9 in 8 away matches
Sounders have lost just once to FC Dallas in last 10 meetings (6-1-3)
details.situation: The Sounders are in strong form early in the 2026 season, sitting 4th in the Western Conference. After a slow start on the road, the attack has exploded at home. Cristian Roldan is playing at an elite level.
details.today: Preparing for Saturday's match vs FC Dallas at Lumen Field (7:30 PM PT). The team is well-rested after last weekend's dominant 4-1 victory.

last_game.highlights: Cristian Roldan scored twice, leading Sounders to emphatic home victory
